title: Why are my boards not showing up on left navigation bar? "workspace is empty create or add board"
excerpt: When my colleague shared her screen yesterday all the boards we have created show up for her on the left panel where mine says “workspace is empty create or add board”. If I click on the name of the workspace I can see r…

posts.author: heyjodi (Jodi Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
When my colleague shared her screen yesterday all the boards we have created show up for her on the left panel where mine says “workspace is empty create or add board”. If I click on the name of the workspace I can see recent boards, but not all that I am a member of. See image:

monday boards not showing up1318×804 57.2 KB

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @heyjodi

Welcome to the Community!

I do see there is a filter applied to the workspace, which I suspect may be causing the issue:

Could you try removing this and let us know if the issue persists?

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: heyjodi (Jodi Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this is it! Thanks from the newbie!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: @heyjodi - Don’t feel bad, I think everyone does that at least once in that nav bar, lol!

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
